case_title: UNIVERSITY OF PENNSYLVANIA VS. CHARLES C. BOATWRIGHT et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-03-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-09-2014 CONTINUED TO OCT-28-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE SEP-09-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF PENNSYLVANIA AS TO DEFENDANT BOATWRIGHT, CHARLES C. DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-14-2014
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF PENNSYLVANIA SERVED SEP-29-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOATWRIGHT, CHARLES C.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-28-2014 CONTINUED TO FEB-03-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-28-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-09-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF PENNSYLVANIA SERVED AUG-11-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOATWRIGHT, CHARLES C.
